# Transcrição: 28. Trait 27 - Great Salespeople want to disrupt the status quo for their industry.

- **Fonte:** 28. Trait 27 - Great Salespeople want to disrupt the status quo for their industry.
- **Duração:** 01:11
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:11]

The great salespeople tend to want to disrupt the status quo of their industry. They might even be difficult to handle with management. Now I'm not saying this to suggest to you that, oh yeah I'm great because I hate managers, okay? I'm not telling you, you're not gonna be great just because you hate managers or resist authority. But the greats do have this this kind of weird thing about I want to disrupt the industry. Think about those people, not just salespeople, but inventors or business people that have disrupted complete ways of thinking and change conditions. Changing things not for the sake of just change, but because they want to disrupt the status quo. They see a better, faster, quicker way of doing things. They're creative people. They're not just renegades, but they see this renegade kind of personality as being necessary to really turn an industry on its head to really, really get the full potential of that environment. They want to turn an industry on its head. They want to do something great. It's in you. It's in everyone. Find your greatness.
